items.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 22 people, health ministry says
items.summary: Eight children are among those reported dead after a series of air strikes hit the south of Beirut.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Israel Says Netanyahu Made a Secret Trip to U.A.E., Which Says He Didn’t
items.summary: The claim and the denial signaled both how close Israel and the United Arab Emirates have become, and how delicate that relationship remains.
